name: LightWave Logic
thesis_short: Electro-optic polymer modulators for next-gen optical transceivers.
thesis_long: Pure-play on electro-optic polymer technology that could replace lithium niobate in high-speed optical modulators. Long road to commercialization but the IP moat is real and the CPO ramp creates urgency for any drop-in modulator improvement.

name: Powell Industries
thesis_short: US alt to GE Vernova — switchgear for data center and grid build-out.
thesis_long: Custom electrical equipment supplier benefiting from data center power demand and grid hardening capex. Backlog visibility is multi-year and the stock is still under-owned vs the obvious GEV/ETN names.

name: Alleima AB
thesis_short: Swedish specialty steel — grouped with photonics chokepoint theme.
thesis_long: Specialty stainless and alloy supplier into industrial and energy end markets. Tagged into the chokepoint framework as a sole-source supplier on several niche tubing applications.

name: IQE plc
thesis_short: InP epitaxial wafer supplier — the substrate floor of the CPO laser stack.
thesis_long: World leader in indium phosphide and gallium arsenide epitaxial wafers. As CPO ramps, every external light source needs InP substrates and IQE is one of a small handful of qualified suppliers. Best performer in his book — claimed +837% YTD.

name: Applied Optoelectronics
thesis_short: Largest 1.6T optical transceiver capacity in US; hyperscaler orders accelerating.
thesis_long: AAOI expects to have the largest production capacity of 1.6T optical transceivers in America. Received new $71M hyperscaler order. $6.69B MC. Went from $25 to $104. Core photonics pick despite Jane Street-driven volatility.

name: AXT Inc
thesis_short: InP/GaAs substrate supplier; up 400% in 4 months but potential 50M share dilution risk.
thesis_long: Core substrate/epitaxy photonics pick. Board proposing 50M new shares (70m->120m, up to $2B dilution) for April 14 vote. Author flagged similar caution as IREN dilution. Still long as AI supply chain bottleneck.

name: Lumentum Holdings
thesis_short: Hidden monopoly in AI optical; InP/laser chokepoint for every GPU/TPU deployment.
thesis_long: Author's long-running thesis: Lumentum sits at the center of every TPU/GPU deployment via InP fab and optical components. Stock ran from $371 to $836 in 4 months. Part of NVDA's $2B optical investments. Core CW laser chokepoint pick along with COHR.

name: Aehr Test Systems
thesis_short: Silicon photonics testing bottleneck; early TER+AAOI stage at $1.1B MC.
thesis_long: Author sees $420 inevitable in 2 years. Multiple hyperscalers qualifying AEHR for silicon photonics/optical transceiver testing. Sonoma production win for hyperscaler AI ASIC processors. Backlog $38.7M effective $50.9M; H2 FY26 guide $25-30M reiterated.

name: Sivers Semiconductors
thesis_short: Swedish photonics IDM — ICs for optical networks and 5G mmWave.
thesis_long: Stockholm-listed photonics specialist with a wafer fab in the UK. Optical product line is a direct CPO play. Tagged at +385% YTD in his framework.

name: Soitec
thesis_short: Top CPO substrate pick alongside TSEM.
thesis_long: Author's top two CPO picks were SOI and Tower Semi. Forward P/E compressing as CPO/SiPH thesis plays out.

name: Circle Internet Group
thesis_short: Stablecoin beneficiary as FX friction/payment rails problem grows.
thesis_long: Author bullish on stablecoins via CRCL after seeing FX friction on X subscriptions (46% int. markup). Sees stablecoins disrupting legacy payment rails.

name: Raspberry Pi
thesis_short: Hoarding + robotics demand driving 58% growth; cheap 2027/2028 forward P/E.
thesis_long: Author projected 48-55% forward growth while analysts said 14-17% ('meme'). Thesis validated: +44.76% post-earnings, analysts revised 2026 to $511M. 2026 P/E 20.6x, 2027 13.2x, 2028 9.5x. Benefit from OpenClaw/robotics hoarding.

name: Reddit Inc.
thesis_short: Worst performer in book — engagement deceleration vs sky-high multiple.
thesis_long: Tagged as the worst performer in the tracker at -32% YTD. Concerns around DAU growth, ad load saturation, and the Google search-traffic dependency.

name: Rocket Lab
thesis_short: Space/defense beneficiary of ceasefire rally and space buildout.
thesis_long: Mentioned as benefiting from Iran ceasefire rally alongside AAOI. Previously referenced as front-run space/fintech rally pick.

name: Sivers Semiconductors
thesis_short: Light source upstream chokepoint for MRVL Celestial/POET CPO at ~$290M MC.
thesis_long: Sivers powers the light source for MRVL Celestial AI's optical fabric CPO roadmap. Author argues downside limited because AVGO/QCOM could buy outright at $290M to control competitors' near-mid term photonics roadmap. #1 in personal high-beta photonics CW laser tierlist.

name: Win Semiconductors
thesis_short: Sleeper GaAs/InP foundry used by LITE, SIVE, AAPL, AVGO, SpaceX at $5.4B MC.
thesis_long: Author long at $4.1B MC (now ~$5.4B). Sits in every major chokepoint: SpaceX Starlink LEO, AAPL, AVGO, LITE, SIVE supply chains. Strategic positioning far exceeds MC. Most important foundry aside from TSM for photonics/robotics/space.

name: Tower Semiconductor
thesis_short: The TSMC of photonics; CPO foundry with NVDA collaboration on 1.6T.
thesis_long: Top CPO pick alongside SOI. Directly collaborates with NVDA on 1.6T scaling. Stock nearly doubled from $115 to $200 in 3 weeks. $22B+ MC. Forward P/E compressed to 16-18x.

name: Nebius Group
thesis_short: NeoCloud beneficiary of hyperscaler buildout delays; NVDA-endorsed.
thesis_long: Jensen Huang publicly said 'NBIS will take care of you.' Confirmed NVDA funding plus convertibles. Differentiated from IREN by securing hyperscaler deals without excessive dilution. Benefits from META $27B deal spillover.

name: CoreWeave
thesis_short: NeoCloud beneficiary of hyperscaler buildout delay spillover.
thesis_long: Grouped with NBIS as neocloud beneficiary. Benefits from hyperscaler capacity constraints.

name: IREN Limited
thesis_short: Excessive $6B ATM dilution at $11.7B MC; compared to BKKT collapse pattern.
thesis_long: Author vocally bearish on IREN's $6B shelf to dilute into open market. Sees pattern similar to BKKT's 99% crash. Critiques board member linked to excessive retail ATMs. Investors should rotate to NBIS.

name: Hammond Power Solutions
thesis_short: Transformer/switchgear multi-year bottleneck play; ~$1.5B USD at 184 CAD.
thesis_long: Dominates transformers (dry, multi-year bottleneck, ~23% of market), switchgear (2-3Y bottleneck), and liquid transformers. Multi-year bottleneck lets you sleep easier despite volatility.

name: SanDisk
thesis_short: Memory supercycle pick; 1350%+ 1Y return with multi-year bottleneck.
thesis_long: Caught tail end of memory rotation alongside Samsung, SK Hynix, MU. Multi-year bottleneck gives conviction. Named alongside AXTI as candidates for next hyperbolic growth.

name: Masan Group
thesis_short: Primary Vietnam tungsten play; world's #2 tungsten producer up 168% 1Y.
thesis_long: Vietnam becoming focus area for Western supply chain investment in rare earths/critical minerals. Masan is primary tungsten stock, up 168.33% 1Y amid China export controls. Tungsten prices soared 557%.

name: Almonty Industries
thesis_short: Tungsten play up 75% after China export controls.
thesis_long: Tungsten beneficiary after China's export controls, up 75% past 3 months. Part of author's precious materials/critical minerals basket.

name: Marvell Technology
thesis_short: Compounder with NVDA $2B investment for joint silicon photonics/Celestial CPO.
thesis_long: Favorite compounder alongside SMTC. NVDA invested $2B validating MRVL/Celestial AI optical fabric CPO roadmap. Light source powered by SIVE.

name: Coherent Corp
thesis_short: CW laser chokepoint; NVDA invested $2B into optical roadmap.
thesis_long: NVDA invested $2B into COHR for optical, same playbook as LITE. Core CPO laser source pick on author's photonics tierlist at $49.2B MC.

name: MACOM Technology Solutions
thesis_short: CW laser photonics exposure at $17.4B MC.
thesis_long: On author's CW laser chokepoint tierlist at #4. Favorite photonics name for optical interconnect ramp.

name: POET Technologies
thesis_short: Celestial interposer supplier shipping 30k optical engines this year.
thesis_long: POET supplies interposers for Celestial/MRVL; guided 30,000 optical engines to ship this year. SIVE is upstream light source. Part of CPO ecosystem.

name: USA Rare Earth
thesis_short: US rare earths supply chain rebuild; critical national security priority.
thesis_long: Part of US rare earths thesis alongside MP after $1.6B US gov funding. Author defends against FT 'unproven groups' framing - obviously unproven because US has nothing.

name: MP Materials
thesis_short: Core US rare earths supply chain rebuild pick.
thesis_long: Grouped with USAR as incredibly important for US rare earth national security priority. Benefits from US gov funding push.

name: Tempus AI
thesis_short: Personalized AI medicine; combined with HIMS for huge TAM.
thesis_long: Author sees huge potential combining HIMS with TEM for personalized AI medicine. Uses Gitlab CEO osteosarcoma case as example of AI-driven personalized treatment.

name: Hims & Hers Health
thesis_short: Personalized AI medicine play combined with TEM.
thesis_long: Paired with TEM as personalized AI medicine thesis.

name: Nike
thesis_short: Losing share to OnCloud, New Balance, Vuori, Lululemon, Uniqlo; trust real-life instincts.
thesis_long: Author sees Nike losing share across athletic/casual wear. Lesson to trust real-life observation - not seeing people wear Nike.

name: Destiny Tech100 (VCX)
thesis_short: Private AI ETF trading at 20x NAV; SpaceX implied $34T; crashed from $425 to $110.
thesis_long: Author warned VCX trading at ~20x NAV implied SpaceX at 23x META valuation. Thesis validated: crashed from $425 to $110 in 4 days.

name: Velo3D
thesis_short: $500M shelf ATM/warrants structurally large vs $311M MC; avoid.
thesis_long: Retail favorite for speculated SpaceX/Anduril/defense supply chain exposure. $32.6M DoW + $11.5M contracts but $500M shelf is structurally large relative to $311M MC.

name: Electro Optic Systems
thesis_short: Space optical ground infrastructure bottleneck; adaptive optics at Mt. Stromlo.
thesis_long: Only ~10% of optical ground infrastructure built. EOS operates stations at Mt. Stromlo equipped with adaptive optics. Beneficiary of space bottleneck.

name: nLight
thesis_short: Directed energy weapons / High Energy Lasers for drone defense.
thesis_long: Author argues US should deploy directed energy weapons (HEL) vs burning $3-4M Patriots on cheap drones. LASR core DEW play.

name: FormFactor
thesis_short: CPO/SiPh testing bottleneck - optical alignment.
thesis_long: Named in CPO/SiPh testing bottleneck basket per Digitimes Taiwan article. Optical alignment exposure.

name: Semtech
thesis_short: Photonics compounder alongside MRVL.
thesis_long: On author's list of photonics compounder favorites with MRVL.
